reference: Hello. I understand your concern. Although it is not possible to completely reverse the changes back to normal, you can use the following topical treatments and then follow up: one. Contractubex cream two. Vitamin C fifteen serum. Mix both in a two:one ratio and apply twice a day for six weeks.
text: Hello, I understand your concern. Although it is not possible to completely reverse the changes back to normal, you can use the following topical treatments and then follow up. 1. Contractive X Cream 2, Vitamin C 15 Serum. Mix both in a 2-1 ratio and apply twice a day for 6 weeks.
